name: BitFuFu Inc. Warrant
summary: BitFuFu Inc. Warrant is a warrant to purchase shares of BitFuFu Inc., granting the holder the right, but not the obligation, to buy BitFuFu Inc. stock at a specified price within a certain period. Warrants are often issued as part of a financing arrangement. The warrants are tied to BitFuFu Inc., which is based in Singapore.
